hero.title: BOOK FREE
hero.description: Experience your first session completely FREE at Fitnet Fitness - Hanoi. No language limits, no strength limits! Achieve your fitness goals with our professional trainers.

about.title: ABOUT US
about.heading: WE ARE
about.description1: Located at Floor 7, No. 23, Alley 89 Pham Van Dong, Cau Giay, Hanoi, Fitnet Fitness is your premier destination for achieving fitness excellence. We believe in breaking barriers - no language limits, no strength limits!
about.description2: Our multilingual facility welcomes members from all backgrounds, providing world-class equipment, expert trainers, and a supportive community to help you reach your fitness goals.

equipment.description: State-of-the-art fitness equipment from leading brands

trainers.description: Certified professionals with years of experience

results.title: Proven Results
results.description: Thousands of success stories and transformations

community.description: Join a supportive and motivating fitness family

services.heading: OUR
services.description: Discover a wide range of fitness services designed to help you achieve your health and wellness goals

personalTraining.title: Personal Training
personalTraining.description: One-on-one coaching with certified trainers to achieve your specific fitness goals

groupClasses.title: Group Classes
groupClasses.description: High-energy group workouts including HIIT, CrossFit, Zumba, and more

nutrition.title: Nutrition Consulting
nutrition.description: Personalized meal plans and dietary guidance from nutrition experts

yoga.title: Yoga & Meditation
yoga.description: Find inner peace and flexibility with our yoga and meditation sessions

weightManagement.title: Weight Management
weightManagement.description: Comprehensive programs for healthy weight loss or muscle gain

basic.name: Basic

pricing.note: All plans include access to modern facilities and equipment. Cancel anytime.

footer.copyright: All rights reserved. | Designed with ❤️ for fitness enthusiasts
